title: WebSocket Commands
description: Send commands to you server using a websocket
body:
Remotely send commands to your server using a websocket.

Created to be used along side [streamer.bot](https://streamer.bot/). 
- Setup alerts directly in the game.
- Have the livestreams chat in minecrafts chat.
- Setup channel rewards that spawn mobs on the player

How to use with Streamer.bot
In streamer.bot go to "Servers/Clients" then "Websocket Clients". Right click and click "add". Give the client a name. Replace the endpoint with ws://_Your servers IP_:25735/. Enable Auto Connect and Reconnect if you want then press "Ok". You may have to right click the client and press "Connect". Use C# in Streamer.bot to send the commands. Example: 
```c#
CPH.WebsocketSend("/summon zombie 0, 100, 0");
```
